title: Celestial Ladder Rank Reward
des: Congratulations! Yesterday in the |C:0xE17123&T:Celestial Ladder Ranking|T: ranked No. |C:0x34e22c&T:%1$s|T:, earning the |C:0x34e22c&T:%2$s title|T: Reward. Don't forget to claim it!

title: Joined Legion Successfully
des: Congratulations on joining Legion |C:0xd1a765&T:%1$s|T:.

title: You Were Kicked from Legion
des: You have been kicked from Legion |C:0xd1a765&T:%1$s|T:Go create a new Legion!

title: Legion Has Been Disbanded
des: Legion|C:0xd1a765&T:%1$s|T: has disbanded. Go create a new Legion!

title: Phantom Beast Tower Opened
des: Congratulations on reaching 52 Level! The |C:0xE17123&T:Phantom Beast Tower|T: has been opened! Climbing the tower yields large amounts of EXP helping you level up quickly, with many mysterious Phantom Beast Chests and materials awaiting you. Go challenge it!

title: Mystery Mine Cave Opened
des: Congratulations on reaching 54 Level! The |C:0xE17123&T:Mystery Mine Cave|T: has been opened! The mine cave yields large amounts of Gold and even Magic Stone, along with Phantom Weapon upgrade materials and other precious items. Go mining!

title: Legion Feature Opened
des: Congratulations on reaching 61 Level!|C:0xE17123&T:Legion|T: gameplay has been opened!|C:0xE17123&T:Legion Totem|T:, |C:0xE17123&T:LegionSkill|T:can provide large amounts of basic and advanced stats. |C:0xE17123&T:LegionShop|T:also has many items for sale. Here, you are no longer alone. For the glory of the Legion, embark on a new journey!

title: Divine Cultivation Feature Opened
des: Congratulations on reaching 80 Level!|C:0xE17123&T:Divine Cultivation|T: path has been opened!From the character interface you can enter the |C:0xE17123&T:Divine Cultivation|T:System. After increasing your Divine Power Level, you will gain large amounts of basic stats with even more gameplay awaiting you!

title: Divine Soul Feature Opened
des: Congratulations on reaching Divine 4!|C:0xE17123&T:Divine Soul|T:, |C:0xE17123&T:Divine Trial|T: have been opened. In the exploration interface you can enter |C:0xE17123&T:Divine Trial|T:, Challenging |C:0xE17123&T:Divine Trial|T:will yield large amounts of|C:0xE17123&T:Divine Soul|T:, |C:0xE17123&T:Divine Soul Essence|T:, Through Equipment and Upgrade to Level|C:0xE17123&T:Divine Soul|T:will yield large attribute boosts!

title: Ruins of Gods Feature Opened
des: Congratulations on reaching Divine 5! The |C:0xE17123&T:Ruins of Gods|T: has been opened! The Gods left behind many ruins where you can dig large amounts of Gold and even Magic Stone, with many precious items awaiting you. Occupying ruins also yields resources. Go explore!

title: Champion Legion War Points Rank Reward
des: Your Legion is currently |C:0xE17123&T:ChampionLegionBattle|T: in Points ranked No. |C:0x34e22c&T:%1$s|T:, Here are your rank rewards, please claim them!

title: Champion Legion War Defeat Rank Reward
des: Congratulations! Today in the |C:0xE17123&T:ChampionLegionBattle|T:Kill Count Rank  ranked No. |C:0x34e22c&T:%1$s|T:. Here are your rewards, please claim them!

title: Maintenance Compensation
des: Dear players, we sincerely apologize that server maintenance prevented you from logging in. We are sending you a sincere |C:34e22c&T:great gift

title: Field Battle
des: As a gallant player you lived in peace, but player |C:0xB72A0F&T:%1$s|T:in |C:0xE17123&T:Field Battle|T: found and defeated you, possibly taking your equipment, Now is the time to go in |C:0xE17123&T:Field Battle|T: in and take revenge!

title: Server Merge Gift Pack
des: Dear player, to provide a better gaming environment and experience, we merged your server. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience during the server merge, and are sending you a sincere gift!

title: Server Merge Compensation
des: Dear player, to provide a better gaming environment and experience, we merged your server. Based on your server, we are also sending you a compensation Gift Pack!

title: Server Merge Name Conflict Compensation
des: Dear player, your character name conflicted with other players after the server merge. The system automatically changed your character name. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and are sending you a sincere gift!
